python-v2.title: Python for Beginners
python-v2.description: This course teaches the core foundations of Python: running code, values, variables, input, strings, conditions, and loops.
python-v2.moreComingSoon: More Python for Beginners lessons are coming soon.

python-v2-0.title: Getting Started with Python
python-v2-0.description: Help learners run Python, read simple programs, and build confidence with the basic syntax.
outcomes: Run Python code in a beginner-friendly environment
Explain how statements, expressions, and comments work
Use print output to observe program behavior
why: Builds confidence with getting started with python.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-v2-1.title: Variables, Input, and Strings
python-v2-1.description: Teach learners how programs remember values, accept user input, and produce readable text.
outcomes: Build strings with common methods and f-strings
why: Builds confidence with variables, input, and strings.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-v2-2.title: Conditions and Logic
python-v2-2.description: Help learners make programs choose different paths using comparisons and conditionals.
outcomes: Write if, elif, and else blocks
why: Builds confidence with conditions and logic.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-v2-3.title: Loops and Iteration
python-v2-3.description: Teach learners to repeat actions, process sequences, and control loop behavior.
outcomes: Use for loops and while loops
why: Builds confidence with loops and iteration.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-v2-0-setup-and-first-programs.title: Setup and First Programs
python-v2-0-setup-and-first-programs.description: Learn what python is used for, running python code, print, comments, and first errors through focused examples and practice.

python-v2-0-values-and-expressions.title: Values and Expressions
python-v2-0-values-and-expressions.description: Learn values, types, and literals, operators and expressions, reading error messages through focused examples and practice.

python-v2-1-variables-and-assignment.title: Variables and Assignment
python-v2-1-variables-and-assignment.description: Learn naming and assigning variables, input and type conversion, common variable mistakes through focused examples and practice.

python-v2-1-string-foundations.title: String Foundations
python-v2-1-string-foundations.description: Learn string indexing and slicing, useful string methods, f-strings and formatting through focused examples and practice.

python-v2-2-conditional-basics.title: Conditional Basics
python-v2-2-conditional-basics.description: Learn if, elif, and else, comparisons and truth values, indentation and blocks through focused examples and practice.

python-v2-2-combining-conditions.title: Combining Conditions
python-v2-2-combining-conditions.description: Learn and, or, and not, truthiness and empty values, checking special cases first through focused examples and practice.

python-v2-3-for-loops.title: For Loops
python-v2-3-for-loops.description: Learn for loops over text, range and counting patterns, accumulators and counters through focused examples and practice.

python-v2-3-while-loops.title: While Loops
python-v2-3-while-loops.description: Learn while loop basics, break and continue, loop debugging through focused examples and practice.
